# Sonar Tracker — Real-Time Crypto Whale Data

> Informational data platform that surfaces large on-chain transactions, whale wallet activity, and public news/social signals across multiple blockchains. Sonar Tracker is not a financial adviser, broker, or dealer and does not provide investment, trading, legal, or tax advice. Output is for informational and educational use only.

## Core Content
- Live whale transaction data across multiple blockchains
- Automated summaries of public news and on-chain whale activity (ORCA assistant)
- Dashboards showing aggregated whale net flow, transaction counts, and exchange in/outflow totals
- Historical and current whale activity metrics (transaction counts, aggregate volume)
- Aggregated public sentiment metrics from social media and news feeds
- Public on-chain transaction details (large volume movements, exchange in/outflows)
- Token-level data: flow aggregates, volume, supply metrics
- Notifications of large on-chain transactions
- Data coverage for multiple tokens including BTC, ETH, SOL and others

## Data Surfaces
- Automated summaries of public on-chain and news data with calibration disclaimers
- Descriptive analysis of whale wallet activity (aggregate accumulation vs distribution metrics)
- Public news headlines and social-engagement metrics
- ETF flow data and other publicly reported macro information

## Platform & Tools
- Real-time dashboards with frequent data refresh
- User-configurable thresholds for transaction notifications
- Multi-chain coverage including Ethereum, Bitcoin, Tron, Solana and others
- Automated text summaries of public data
- CSV export of public data shown in the product

## Resources
- Educational guides on on-chain analysis terminology
- FAQs explaining how the product surfaces public data
- Tutorials on interpreting whale alerts and aggregate metrics
- Glossary of crypto and on-chain analysis terms

## Important Notices
- Sonar Tracker is not registered as an investment adviser, broker, or dealer in any jurisdiction
- Output is informational and educational only and is not a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any asset
- Past on-chain activity does not predict future price movement
- Cryptocurrency carries a high risk of total loss; users should consult a qualified, licensed financial adviser before making investment decisions
- Service is not available in OFAC-sanctioned jurisdictions

## Optional
- Blog with educational explainers on on-chain analysis and crypto terminology
- Subscription tier information
